data.body: B5 parity gap surfaced by B4: the workflow plan-review VERIFY step has a STATIC execution_mode=single_turn (plan_review_verifier.md front-matter), so it is always single-turn — whereas bespoke run_review makes Pass-2 verify AGENTIC when any finding is code-grounded (pass2_verify(agentic=grounded)). Before/at cutover, DECIDE: either give the workflow verify step a dynamic execution_mode (so it goes agentic for code-grounded findings, matching bespoke) or accept the difference (single-turn verify is cheaper but may verify code-grounded findings less thoroughly). B4's parity harness documents this divergence; resolve it in B5.
